meaning: adj.&n.鎶楁儕鍘ョ殑(鑽墿),鎶楃棄鎸涚殑(鑽墿)
examples: AIM To study the anticonvulsant effect of domestic zopiclone (ZPL).
Anticonvulsant medications may be combined with lithium, or with each other, for maximum effect.
One possibility is to combine an anticonvulsant with an antioxidant to increase the protective effect.
